role_title: Associate Manager, Ads New Ventures - Strategy & Operations

level_signals: 5+ years of experience in strategy & operations / product management / management consulting / mergers & acquisitions
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base, consistent with mid-senior IC at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 5+ years of experience in strategy & operations / product management / management consulting / mergers & acquisitions or related experience (preferable in the advertising or ad tech industry)
You have a proven track record leading 0→1 projects, independently identifying, scoping, and proving performance for high potential concepts.
You're energized by diving into difficult problems with first principles and working cross-functionally with multi-disciplinary teams.
You're a logic & data-driven problem solver that can leverage Excel/Google Sheets to derive answers (SQL experience is a plus)
You have a strong growth mindset.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: preferable in the advertising or ad tech industry

scope.surface: Ads New Ventures — new advertising businesses, products, and services on the DoorDash platform
primary_metrics_inferred: New business line launch success / revenue
Operational performance of new advertising ventures
core_responsibilities: Conceptualize, build, and launch new bets at DoorDash
Shape the business unit strategy, influence the product vision, and develop GTM strategy for adoption
Scope tests and experiments to help answer questions that require new data
Drive pilot and build plans in partnership with cross-functional teams
Build models to evaluate product success and set new goals
Build consensus among cross-functional partners as ventures grow from idea to reality

green_flags: Clear mandate: 0→1 new ventures within a defined Ads team
Cross-functional scope gives broad visibility into product, eng, sales, and marketing
Growth path articulated: 'grow into the GM of bold ambitious ideas'
red_flags: Location not specified — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite and which cities are eligible
Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD
Pay range is wide ($50K spread), suggesting significant location or level variability
